# PDF Conversion Dependencies
# 
# This file contains the Python dependencies required for HTML to PDF conversion
# using wkhtmltopdf. Note that wkhtmltopdf itself must be installed separately
# as a system binary (e.g., via brew install wkhtmltopdf on macOS).
#
beautifulsoup4>=4.11.1
